name: Green World Hot Spring Resort & Golf Club
source_notes: Green World Hot Spring Resort is a real resort in the Sai Yok / Tha Muang area of Kanchanaburi with natural hot spring facilities. Some aggregate directories list it with a golf club attached, but no hole count has been confirmed. Given the resort-hotel context, this is likely a small par-3 or 9-hole executive layout rather than a standard 18-hole championship course. No fee data, phone, or official website for the golf component found. If published, would go in the kanchanaburi data region.
skip_reason: INSUFFICIENT_DATA — hole count unknown (likely not 18H), no fees, no phone
